questions.q: According to CEO Haluk Bayraktar on May 10, 2026, Turkish defense company Baykar aims to begin the first serial deliveries of which unmanned combat aircraft this year?
On May 10, 2026, CEO Luu Bach Dat of which company admitted to shortcomings in legal compliance during an extraordinary general meeting?
